CustomField.formula: IF(ISPICKVAL(CityPropertyAllowsIssueITBI__c, 'Barueri'), "Sim", IF(ISPICKVAL(CityPropertyAllowsIssueITBI__c, 'Diadema'), "Sim", IF(ISPICKVAL(CityPropertyAllowsIssueITBI__c, 'Guarulhos'), "Sim", IF(ISPICKVAL(CityPropertyAllowsIssueITBI__c, 'Novo Hamburgo'), "Sim", IF(ISPICKVAL(CityPropertyAllowsIssueITBI__c, 'Osasco'), "Sim", IF(ISPICKVAL(CityPropertyAllowsIssueITBI__c, 'Rio de Janeiro'), "Sim", IF(ISPICKVAL(CityPropertyAllowsIssueITBI__c, 'São Bernardo do Campo'), "Sim", IF(ISPICKVAL(CityPropertyAllowsIssueITBI__c, 'São Paulo'), "Sim", "Não"))))))))
CustomField.label: Cidade do Imóvel Permite 5A Emitir ITBI?
